theme_and_archetype.description: A deep void dark, highly dense, monospace-driven terminal aesthetic that treats beliefs like a git repository or a financial ledger. Emphasizes stark structural borders, monospace typography, and data-density.

font_families.headings: JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono, monospace
font_families.body: JetBrains Mono, IBM Plex Mono, monospace

rules: No rounded, soft fonts. Strictly monospace.
Headings are moderate in size (text-4xl max) to keep the dense dashboard feel.
Use ASCII brackets [ ] or >_ prefixes for section titles.
Data should feel structured like terminal outputs.
Never use pure #FFFFFF. Use #E5E5E5 for max contrast.
Borders are 1px solid, never soft drop shadows unless it's a neon glow for focus.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense and compact padding (p-2, p-4) within panes, 1px gaps between grid items (achieved via border-collapse or gap-px with a background color).
layout_and_spacing.containers: All containers must have square corners (rounded-none). 1px solid border. No internal drop shadows.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Strictly left-aligned. Center alignment is banned unless for empty state messages.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FFB000] text-[#050505] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs px-4 py-2 border border-[#FFB000] hover:bg-[#E59E00] transition-colors rounded-none
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#FFB000] font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-xs px-4 py-2 border border-[#FFB000] hover:bg-[#FFB000]/10 transition-colors rounded-none

inputs.textarea: bg-[#050505] border border-[#262626] text-[#E5E5E5] p-4 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#FFB000] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FFB000] rounded-none w-full min-h-[200px] font-mono resize-none transition-all
inputs.text: bg-[#050505] border border-[#262626] text-[#E5E5E5] px-3 py-2 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#FFB000] rounded-none font-mono

cards_and_panes.header: border-b border-[#262626] pb-2 mb-4 text-xs tracking-[0.2em] text-[#888888] uppercase flex justify-between items-center

alerts_and_conflicts.conflict_diff: bg-[#EF4444]/10 border-l-2 border-[#EF4444] text-[#E5E5E5] p-3 font-mono
alerts_and_conflicts.resolution: bg-[#10B981]/10 border-l-2 border-[#10B981] text-[#E5E5E5] p-3 font-mono

confidence_dial.style: Use Shadcn Slider for the confidence dial (0-100%). Override track to bg-[#262626], and thumb to be square (rounded-none) and bg-[#FFB000]. Alternatively, pure ASCII styling: `[####---] 60%`.

shadcn_components.tabs: Override 'h-9' with 'h-auto rounded-none'. Border bottom on active tab with #FFB000.
shadcn_components.toast: Use Sonner but style it strictly rectangular, black bg, amber text, 1px border.

implementation: Use strict 1px borders (#262626) to create window panes, similar to a tiling window manager.
Apply a subtle scanline effect using repeating-linear-gradient on the main background (optional, but adds texture).
Use neon glow (drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(255,176,0,0.5)]) ONLY on active focus states or highly critical contradiction alerts.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard cuts or fast linear transitions (duration-75 or duration-150 ease-linear). No bouncy springs.
motion_and_interactions.focus_states: High contrast 1px outline or ring with the primary accent (#FFB000).
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use a blinking block cursor (█) or an ASCII spinner (-, \, |, /) instead of a circular loading spinner.

icons_and_assets.rules: Use sharp, geometric icons. Avoid soft, rounded icons. Whenever possible, replace icons with ASCII equivalents (e.g., '[+]', '->', '[x]').

media.note_to_agent: Images are explicitly prohibited in this design to maintain a pure, uncompromising terminal aesthetic. DO NOT use placeholder images. Rely entirely on typography, 1px borders, and pure CSS structures (Retro-Futurism Terminal Look).

special_features_implementation.ledger_view: Design like a `git log`. Chronological feed with vertical connecting lines. Each entry has a hash-like ID (e.g., `blf_8f92a`) and a timestamp. Use monospace columns for alignment.
special_features_implementation.force_directed_graph: Use `react-force-graph-2d` (or similar). Canvas background `#050505`. Nodes: `#111111` with `#FFB000` borders. Links: `#262626` or `#FFB000` with 0.3 opacity. Highlight upstream paths on node hover.
special_features_implementation.crux_view: Render like a code stack trace. `-> Upstream Assumption: [Belief ID] at Confidence 80%`
special_features_implementation.conflict_scanner: Render like a `git diff`. Highlight conflicting text in red background colors with strikethrough for contradicted beliefs, and green for aligned text.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards (#E5E5E5 on #050505 provides > 15:1 contrast).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute based on role (e.g., `data-testid='submit-belief-button'`, `data-testid='confidence-slider'`).
